title: Fix DetailPopup scrolling: add can_focus and auto-focus on mount
description:
The DetailPopup VerticalScroll container is not scrollable because it is missing can_focus=True. The wide-layout detail panel uses VerticalScroll(id='detail-panel', can_focus=True) but the popup uses VerticalScroll(id='detail-popup-dialog') without can_focus, so keyboard scroll events are never delivered to it.

Fix in src/agent_takt/tui/app.py:
1. Add can_focus=True to the VerticalScroll in DetailPopup.compose() — change VerticalScroll(id='detail-popup-dialog') to VerticalScroll(id='detail-popup-dialog', can_focus=True).
2. Add an on_mount method to DetailPopup that calls self.query_one('#detail-popup-dialog', VerticalScroll).focus() so the scroll container is focused immediately when the popup opens and j/k/scroll keys work without requiring the user to click first.
